channel.title: DevOps on Murat Kurkoglu | orioninsist
channel.description: Recent content in DevOps on Murat Kurkoglu | orioninsist

item.title: 7 Bash Commands That Saved My Career (And Sanity)
item.author: muratkurkoglu@gmail.com (Murat Kurkoglu)
item.description: Stop using the mouse. Discover the 7 Linux commands that transform you from a beginner to an undisputed expert.

item.title: 5 Bash Commands That Separate Junior Devs from Senior Engineers
item.author: muratkurkoglu@gmail.com (Murat Kurkoglu)
item.description: Stop clicking. Learn rsync, lsof, and grep to move from 'user' to 'admin'. The GUI is holding you back.

item.title: Automating Linux Backups with rsync: A Set-and-Forget Strategy
item.author: muratkurkoglu@gmail.com (Murat Kurkoglu)
item.description: Learn how to secure your data using rsync and cron. A complete guide to incremental backups for Linux systems.
